market_pulse: Competitive nightclub scene active with major headliners (Lil Wayne at Zouk, Zedd at OMNIA, David Guetta at LIV Beach) this week; LIV Beach momentum strong with DJ lineup (Kaila Troy, David Guetta, DJ IRVG Apr 17-19).

content_gaps.description: High volume of UGC from influencers at competing clubs (XS, Encore, OMNIA), particularly outfit/nightlife content. LIV Beach has strong following but lower UGC engagement on latest posts.
